prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类最低位次分别为约303名、358名、364名、264名、262名。2021-2023年位次在300-364名区间波动，2024年起明显前移至264名，2025年基本持平于262名。近两年位次稳定在260名左右，2025年基准约262名；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划：2021年26人、2022年23人、2023年23人、2024年18人、2025年45人、2026年10人。2025年计划大幅扩招至45人，2026年则大幅缩招至10人，较2025年减少约77.8%。大幅缩招意味着名额稀缺，竞争将显著加剧，位次有望进一步前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第4名，属于全国顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（撤稿量较高）及学校管理舆情；抖音综合热度排名第42位（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平。整体声誉偏负面可能轻微抑制报考热情，但顶尖名校的刚性需求仍强劲；拥有28个A-/A/A+学科，其中A+学科包括计算机科学与技术、机械工程、材料科学与工程、生物学、工商管理、管理科学与工程、临床医学、口腔医学、外国语言文学等。计算机科学与技术（A+）、电子信息类（A/A+）、机械工程（A+）等王牌专业与招生专业高度对应，学科实力对考生有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业在2024-2026年专业热度分析中持续处于高热推荐或推荐等级；辽宁省2026年普通高考总人数约20万人，按近年物理类占比约74.7%估算，物理类考生约14.94万人，较2025年14.34万人略有增加，竞争基数扩大。；上海交通大学位于上海市，属一线城市，对辽宁考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年稳定在260名左右、2026年招生计划大幅缩招约77.8%（竞争加剧使位次前移）、学校层次极高（软科第4）、声誉偏负面（轻微抑制）、考生总数小幅增加（竞争略加剧）等因素，考虑2025年基准262名及非线性因素，向上修正50名；预测2026年物理类最低位次约190名，区间140–240名。

- 电子信息类（计算机永强试验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间140-240名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向，一档专业作为冲刺目标。位次明显优于区间下限（140名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（人工智能、IEEE试点班）；位次接近区间上限（240名附近）应以二档专业为主。三档专业较少，建议结合个人兴趣选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 303, 358, 364, 264, and 262 respectively. Rankings fluctuated between 300-364 from 2021 to 2023, then notably advanced to 264 in 2024, and remained nearly unchanged at 262 in 2025. In the past two years, rankings stabilized around 260, with a baseline of about 262 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Liaoning Province for Physics Category: 26 in 2021, 23 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 18 in 2024, 45 in 2025, and 10 in 2026. The 2025 plan significantly expanded to 45, while the 2026 plan drastically reduced to 10, a decrease of about 77.8% compared to 2025. The sharp reduction means scarce spots, intensifying competition, and rankings are expected to advance further.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 4th in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years, placing it among the top-tier universities nationwide, strongly attracting high-scoring students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to academic misconduct incidents (high retraction volume) and university management public opinion. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranks 42nd (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level. The overall slightly negative reputation may mildly suppress application enthusiasm, but the rigid demand for top prestigious universities remains strong. It has 28 A-/A/A+ disciplines, including A+ disciplines such as Computer Science and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Biology, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering, Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and Foreign Languages and Literatures. Top-tier majors like Computer Science and Technology (A+), Electronic Information (A/A+), and Mechanical Engineering (A+) closely correspond to enrollment majors, with strong disciplinary appeal to students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have consistently been at high heat or recommended levels in the 2024-2026 major popularity analysis. In 2026, the total number of general college entrance examination takers in Liaoning Province is about 200,000. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of approximately 74.7%, the estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 149,400, a slight increase from 143,400 in 2025, expanding the competition base. Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, which has a strong regional appeal to Liaoning students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as rankings stabilizing around 260 in the past two years, a drastic enrollment reduction of about 77.8% in 2026 (intensifying competition and advancing rankings), the university's extremely high level (4th in Soft Science), slightly negative reputation (mild suppression), and a small increase in total examinees (slightly intensifying competition), based on the 2025 baseline of 262 and nonlinear factors, an upward adjustment of 50 places is made. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 190, with a range of 140–240.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Artificial Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class)
- Electronic Information (IEEE Pilot Class, including Dual Degree Program)
- Electronic Information (Computer Yongqiang Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical (Qian Xuesen Engineering Science Pilot Class, including Dual Degree Program)
- Robotics Engineering (Autonomous Intelligent Leading Class)
- Embodied Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- No other Physics Category enrollment majors (2026 plan only includes 6 major directions, all covered).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 140-240, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the primary application direction, with Tier 1 majors as reach targets. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 140), prioritize reaching for Tier 1 top-tier majors (Artificial Intelligence, IEEE Pilot Class). If the ranking is near the upper bound of the range (around 240), focus on Tier 2 majors. Tier 3 majors are few, so choose based on personal interest.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum rankings for History Category in 2024-2025 are approximately 175 and 176 respectively, with high stability over two years; the 2025 baseline is about 176. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning Province: 6 in 2024, 6 in 2025, and 10 in 2026. The 2026 plan expands by about 66.7% compared to 2025, with an absolute increase of 4 students. The expansion increases the number of spots, slightly easing competition, and the ranking may shift slightly downward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranking 4th in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years, belonging to the top tier of national universities. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative; the comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 42nd (relatively hot). The overall slightly negative reputation may mildly suppress application enthusiasm, but the rigid demand for top prestigious schools remains strong. The corresponding disciplines for History Category majors: Law (A), Journalism and Communication (A), Foreign Languages and Literature (A+). Law at A level, Journalism and Communication at A level, Foreign Languages and Literature at A+, indicating strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In the 2024-2026 major popularity analysis, Law is in a state of differentiation and observation (slightly hot), while Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination takers in Liaoning Province in 2026 is about 200,000. Based on the recent History Category proportion of about 28.2%, the estimated number of History Category examinees is about 56,400, roughly flat compared to 56,300 in 2025. Shanghai, located in a first-tier city, has a strong regional attraction for History Category examinees from Liaoning.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the high stability of historical rankings (175-176), the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by 66.7% (slightly easing competition, causing the ranking to shift backward), the extremely high university level, the slightly negative reputation (mildly suppressing), and the basically flat total number of examinees, no additional corrections are made. The predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 246, with a range of 196-296.
